author: codex
scope: Codex-only relation endpoint cleanup prep for one current unexpected_relation_endpoint_shape issue; no durable overrides, submissions, generated outputs, LOG, manifest, canonical JSONL, DB, wiki, materialized data, or validation outputs were mutated.

issue_before.message: implemented_by expects project -> entity, got event -> entity

why_data_cleanup_not_validator_gap.decision: Do not widen implemented_by to event -> entity.
why_data_cleanup_not_validator_gap.reason: The cited source sentence supports MTA Bridges and Tunnels as the agency continuing work on the Central Business District Tolling Program. The FHWA FONSI is a separate regulatory approval event within the same paragraph, not the thing implemented by MTA Bridges and Tunnels. Current rules correctly reserve implemented_by for project -> entity.

canonical_relation.display_name: CBDTP FHWA FONSI - MTA Bridges and Tunnels
canonical_relation.raw_text: MTA Bridges and Tunnels continues the work necessary to the Central Business District Tolling Program (CBDTP)

payload.description: MTA Bridges and Tunnels continues work on the CBDTP for which FHWA issued a favorable FONSI

quotes.quote: MTA Bridges and Tunnels continues the work necessary to the Central Business District Tolling Program ("CBDTP")
quotes.supports: CBDTP project/program implemented_by MTA Bridges and Tunnels

quotes.quote: On June 26, 2023, after an official 30-day public availability period for the Final EA and draft Finding of No Significant Impact ("FONSI"), the FHWA issued a favorable FONSI
quotes.supports: Separate FHWA FONSI approval event; not the implemented_by subject

row.reason: Codex relation endpoint cleanup batch220 replaces malformed implemented_by event -> entity relation relation_cbdtp-fhwa-fonsi-implemented-by-bt. The cited paragraph supports Central Business District Tolling Program project -> MTA Bridges and Tunnels agency-role context; the FHWA FONSI is a separate approval event and should not be the implemented_by subject.
